name: Chongqing Sifang New Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Chongqing Sifang New Material Co., Ltd. is a Chinese company focused on the research, development, production, and sale of new chemical materials. Their products include environmentally friendly polymer materials, specialty resins, and additives used in various industries such as coatings, adhesives, and plastics. The company is based in Chongqing, China.
